summary: Tested Gap 5 (notification prefs UI + backend) and Gap 6 (GDPR data export). 13/14 backend tests passed (1 transient 500 on messages_sent that resolved on retry). All frontend checks passed. Everything working as expected.

minor.issue: One transient 500 during parallel test run (messages_sent test). Direct retry returned 200. Likely intermittent Supabase query timeout, not a code bug.

action_items: Run database migration v24 (supabase_migration_v24_notification_prefs.sql) to enable PATCH /notification-prefs. Currently returns 503 as expected — this is by design.
critical_code_review_comments: GET /notification-prefs: Correctly returns defaults when notification_prefs column not yet present (coach.get returns None, falls back to NOTIFICATION_PREF_DEFAULTS).
PATCH /notification-prefs: Correctly catches PGRST204 error when column missing and returns 503 with migration message.
GET /data-export: Works fully, returns Content-Disposition: attachment header, strips password_hash and session_token from account object. All 6 required keys present.

Frontend: 4 notif toggles render correctly with correct default states (highlight_reel=ON, commitment=ON, programme_view=OFF, contact_countdown=ON). Save button shows toast with v24 migration message (expected). Download button present in Data & Account section.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Gap 5 fully verified: GET /notification-prefs returns defaults without v24 migration. PATCH /notification-prefs returns 503 with correct message before v24 (expected). Settings UI has all 4 toggles with correct states and save-notif-prefs-btn. Gap 6 fully verified: data-export returns JSON with Content-Disposition: attachment, all 6 required keys, no sensitive fields. download-data-btn present in UI. Regression: login, privacy, profile PATCH all working. Once v24 migration is run, PATCH /notification-prefs should be retested to confirm it saves and returns updated values.
